# Precision Weight + Wellness

> Medical weight management practice in New York City led by Dr. Libby Rhee, DO, MS, FAAD.

Precision Weight + Wellness (at Liora Dermatology) provides medically supervised weight management using FDA-approved GLP-1 and dual-agonist medications including Semaglutide (Wegovy/Ozempic) and Tirzepatide (Mounjaro/Zepbound).

## Key Information

- Website: https://www.precisionweightwellness.com
- Provider: Dr. Libby Rhee, DO, MS, FAAD (Board-Certified Dermatologist, Obesity Medicine)
- Location: 110 E 60th Street, Suite 800, New York, NY 10022
- Phone: +1-212-433-4569
- Email: hello@precisionww.com
- Service Areas: New York (in-person + telehealth), Connecticut (telehealth), Michigan (telehealth)

## Services

- Personalized medical weight management programs
- GLP-1 medication therapy (Semaglutide, Tirzepatide)
- Monthly follow-up visits with Dr. Rhee
- Lab work and metabolic monitoring
- Nutritional counseling
- B12 and lipotropic injections
- Insurance prior authorization support

## Pricing

- Essential: $199/month (1 visit/month, medication management, quarterly labs)
- Premium: $349/month (2 visits/month, B12 injections, nutritional counseling)
- Concierge: $599/month (unlimited check-ins, priority scheduling, direct access to Dr. Rhee)
- Founding member rate: 20% off for life (first 20 patients)
- Medication costs are separate and may be covered by insurance

## Eligibility

- BMI ≥ 30, or BMI ≥ 27 with weight-related comorbidity
- Comorbidities include: Type 2 diabetes, hypertension, high cholesterol, sleep apnea, cardiovascular disease, PCOS
- Online eligibility tool available at /eligibility

## How to Book

1. Visit https://www.precisionweightwellness.com/book
2. Or call +1-212-433-4569
3. Or email hello@precisionww.com
4. Initial consultation includes health assessment, lab review, and personalized treatment plan

## Detailed Information

For comprehensive information, see: https://www.precisionweightwellness.com/llms-full.txt
